machine.name: Legal Services Commercialization And Enforcement Notice Letter Evidence Gate
machine.description: Legal services workflow machine for notice letter evidence gate in the commercialization and enforcement workstream. It monitors assemble ownership, registrations, specimens, claim charts, screenshots, and chain of title. This is an operational workflow example for individual and corporate legal services, not legal advice.

metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: assemble ownership, registrations, specimens, claim charts, screenshots, and chain of title
sourceGuidance: USPTO provisional patent applications: complete written description, inventor naming, filing fee/cover sheet, 12-month nonprovisional benefit window
USPTO Patent Center: electronic filing and application management for patent submissions
USPTO trademark process and Trademark Center: mark/goods-services review, account identity verification, filing and docket tracking
U.S. Copyright Office eCO registration: application, fee, deposit copy/copies, work-type/form selection
U.S. Copyright Office preregistration: limited-use preregistration for eligible unpublished works likely to face prerelease infringement
metadata.legalDisclaimer: Workflow automation example only; attorney review is required for legal advice, filing decisions, and jurisdiction-specific analysis.
agentActions: Route notice letter evidence gate to attorney review for deadline, ownership, or rights-risk triage.
Dispatch copyright_workflow_agent to optimize the next workstep for notice letter evidence gate.
Create or update docket/checklist tasks for notice letter evidence gate.
Mark notice letter evidence gate ready for the next controlled workflow step.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map legal intake, docket, evidence, filing-portal, and AI review signals into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to attorney review, workstep optimization, docket updates, or product launch gates.

sequences.name: Notice Letter Evidence Gate: INCOMPLETE_OR_RISK -> ATTORNEY_REVIEW

sequences.name: Notice Letter Evidence Gate: READY -> READY_FOR_NEXT_STEP

metadata.action: Mark notice letter evidence gate ready for the next controlled workflow step.
